normalization.notes: Store modern Gujarati text in NFC and preserve reviewed source forms. Do not strip vowel signs, anusvara, candrabindu, virama, or rare nukta marks during analysis.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: consonant bases, independent vowels, dependent vowel signs, inherent vowel, anusvara, virama, common conjuncts, and rare nukta notes
segmentation.notes: Gujarati uses whitespace for coarse words but lessons need akshara-aware review. The script lacks the Devanagari headline and has visually compact vowel signs that require font checks.
